landing.heroTitle: Find your working rhythm in one pass
landing.heroBody: Available tests and engineering blog notes live in a single catalog. Expand a card, choose an action, and move forward with one deterministic handoff.

test.resultBody: Result is computed from your final answers, including any updated Q1 choice.
test.unknownAvailableNote: For a better experience, please agree to the terms to proceed with the test.
test.unknownOptOutNote: For a better experience, please agree to the terms before proceeding with the test. You can still continue without agreeing.
test.optedOutAvailableWarning: This test is only available to users who have agreed. We're sorry, but if you keep your current preference, you will not be able to take this test.

history.title: Local Result History
history.body: Each completed run is stored as an independent entry (newest first, max 50).

consent.message: We use cookies and similar technologies to help the service work properly and to understand how it is used. You can choose whether to allow optional cookies, and you can change your choice at any time.
